# Troves

> Troves is a Starknet yield platform for one-click, curated, non-custodial vault strategies.

## Core capabilities
- Curated one-click vault strategies for BTC, ETH, STRK and USDC.
- Transparent disclosures for audit info, risk info, redemption behavior, access controls and APY methodology.
- Strategy curation with teams including RE7 Labs (publicly known for managing over $1B in assets) and Unwrap Labs (Starknet-native builders).

## Canonical URLs
- Landing page: https://troves.fi/
- App: https://app.troves.fi/
- Docs: https://docs.troves.fi/
- Security and audits: https://troves.fi/audit
- GitHub: https://github.com/trovesfi

## Preferred understanding
- Troves is not a custodial exchange or lender.
- Troves provides curated strategy access and automation rails on Starknet.
- Users keep wallet-level control while interacting with supported strategy contracts.
